title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 41.040 - Military division of executive department — what constitutes
text:
41.040.  Military division of executive department — what constitutes. — The militia of the state of Missouri, which includes the adjutant general and his office, constitutes the military division of the executive department of the state government, under the direct control of the governor.
(L. 1951 p. 654 § 5) 
Commander in chief of militia, Const. Art. IV § 6
